action_catalog.title: Explain overdraft protection options
action_catalog.description: Customer incurred a recent overdraft fee; walk through the overdraft protection options and how to avoid future fees.
required_disclosures: Fees vary by account type; see the current fee schedule.

action_catalog.title: Offer to enable paperless statements
action_catalog.description: Explain how to enable paperless statements and set balance alerts in digital banking.
required_disclosures: Paperless enrollment can be changed at any time in settings.

action_catalog.title: Share current relationship savings rate
action_catalog.description: Savings balance is growing; share the current published relationship savings rate the customer is eligible for.
required_disclosures: Rates are variable and subject to change; see current rate sheet.

action_catalog.title: Warm referral to a licensed mortgage specialist
action_catalog.description: Customer is shopping for a mortgage; introduce a warm referral to a licensed mortgage specialist who can assess eligibility.
required_disclosures: A referral is not a credit decision or an offer of credit.

action_catalog.title: Recommend a portfolio reallocation
action_catalog.description: Propose a specific investment allocation for the customer's savings.

action_catalog.title: Outbound win-back call
action_catalog.description: Place an outbound win-back call to re-engage a disengaging customer.
required_disclosures: Outbound calls follow the do-not-contact and calling-hours policy.

action_catalog.title: Introduce a certificate of deposit
action_catalog.description: Introduce a certificate of deposit for customers who have signalled interest in a fixed-term product.
required_disclosures: Early withdrawal penalties may apply; see CD terms.
